# Application Performance Monitoring Control Plane

Manage OCI Application Performance Monitoring domains from Kubernetes with a reviewed controller-backed runtime.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `apmcontrolplane` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-apmcontrolplane-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apmcontrolplane:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-apmcontrolplane-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to ApmDomain while DataKey, ApmDomainWorkRequest, and generic work-request helper families stay unpublished.
- The published runtime uses service-SDK work requests for create, update, and delete, with replacement-only handling for `compartmentId` and `isFreeTier`.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
